GET /payments/list the `items/data/items/installment_options/items/installments/items/number_of_installments` response's property `type/format` changed from `string/binary` to `array<integer/int32>` for status `200`
GET /payments/{payment_id} the `installment_options/items/installments/items/number_of_installments` response's property `type/format` changed from `string/binary` to `array<integer/int32>` for status `200`
GET /payments/{payment_id}/cancel_post_capture the `installment_options/items/installments/items/number_of_installments` response's property `type/format` changed from `string/binary` to `array<integer/int32>` for status `200`
GET /v2/connector-accounts/{id} removed the required property `payment_methods_enabled/items/payment_method_subtypes/items/payment_method_type` from the response with the `200` status
GET /v2/profiles/{id}/connector-accounts removed the required property `items/payment_methods_enabled/items/payment_method_subtypes/items/payment_method_type` from the response with the `200` status
POST /account/{account_id}/webhooks/{merchant_connector_id} the request property `event_type` became required
POST /gsm removed the required property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/retry` from the response with the `200` status
POST /gsm the `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/` response's property `type` changed from `object` to `null` for status `200`
POST /gsm the response property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/` became nullable for the status `200`
POST /gsm the response property `feature_data` became optional for the status `200`
POST /gsm/get removed the required property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/retry` from the response with the `200` status
POST /gsm/get the `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/` response's property `type` changed from `object` to `null` for status `200`
POST /gsm/get the response property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/` became nullable for the status `200`
POST /gsm/get the response property `feature_data` became optional for the status `200`
POST /gsm/update removed the required property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/retry` from the response with the `200` status

POST /gsm/update the response property `feature_data/oneOf[subschema #1]/` became nullable for the status `200`
POST /gsm/update the response property `feature_data` became optional for the status `200`

POST /v2/connector-accounts added the new required request property `payment_methods_enabled/payment_method_subtypes/items/payment_method_subtype`
POST /v2/connector-accounts removed the request property `payment_methods_enabled/payment_method_subtypes/items/payment_method_type`
